title: Vegan Thai Beef Curry
description: A vegan version of the classic Thai beef curry, made with tender and flavorful ingredients. This dish is a perfect blend of spicy and savory flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add coconut milk and stir to combine.
Add mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with basil leaves and serve.
